name: RSS Harvester
description: Polls RSS and Atom feeds, applies LLM relevance filtering against your stated interests, and publishes enriched news.article items to the Item Bus.
tagline: Polls your RSS feeds and uses AI to surface only what you actually care about — configure your interests and let the model filter the noise.

ownedSettings.label: Feeds & Interests
ownedSettings.description: RSS/Atom sources and LLM relevance filter topics.

settings.label: Feeds & Interests
settings.description: RSS/Atom sources and relevance filter topics.

fields.label: Feed URLs
fields.helpText: One URL per line. RSS 2.0 and Atom 1.0 are both supported.

fields.label: Interests (one per line)
fields.placeholder:
AI and machine learning
startup funding and venture capital
climate policy
fields.helpText: Describe topics you care about. When set, the AI model scores each article for relevance and drops low-scoring items. Leave blank to harvest everything.

fields.label: Relevance threshold (1–5)
fields.helpText: Articles scoring below this threshold are dropped. 1 = keep almost everything, 5 = keep only highly relevant articles.

fields.label: Max items per run
fields.helpText: Maximum number of new articles to process in a single run. Extra articles are deferred to the next run.

routes.label: RSS
routes.description: Feed status, LLM filter stats, latest items, and manual run controls.
